about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Backend Developer focused on Java/Spring Boot, Node.js, and REST APIs, with a strong background in research, data, and technical documentation.

hero.eyebrow: Backend Developer | Java | Spring Boot | Node.js
hero.headline: Backend Developer focused on Java and Spring Boot, building secure APIs, efficient integrations, and scalable systems.
hero.description: I’m Mateus R. Campos, a Computer Science graduate and Backend Developer. My background also includes international scientific research, data analysis, and structured problem-solving. I apply this experience to developing REST APIs, authentication and authorization solutions, service integrations, automated tests, and reliable, maintainable applications.

items.title: Integration-oriented backend
items.description: I design REST APIs, authentication, authorization, and service integrations with attention to contracts, data, and operational continuity.

items.title: Verifiable quality
items.description: I use automated tests, TDD when it fits, documentation, and version control to reduce regressions and make maintenance easier.

items.title: Analytical thinking
items.description: From scientific research, I bring the ability to break down problems, validate hypotheses, and communicate technical decisions clearly.

journey.title: Journey
description: I am a backend developer with a BSc in Computer Science (2026), hands-on experience in Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, and REST APIs, and recent backend development work with Node.js.

Before technology, I worked as a researcher at INRAE in France, leading multidisciplinary projects, statistical analyses, and predictive models with R and Python. That foundation helps me write software with method, documentation, and attention to evidence.

items.organization: Isaac Kennedy Desenvolvimento de Software LTDA
items.summary: Worked on backend application development and maintenance, focused on APIs, data, stability, and collaboration in an agile environment.
bullets: Developed and maintained backend applications using Node.js.
Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated SQL and NoSQL databases.
Handled bug fixing, automated tests, Git version control, and Scrum/Kanban project tracking.

items.organization: Institut Sophia Agrobiotech, INRAE - CEA Team
items.summary: Applied research in complex projects with international teams, data analysis, and scientific communication in English.
bullets: Led multidisciplinary projects with advanced statistical analysis in R and Python.
Developed predictive models for complex biological systems.
Published scientific results and produced technical documentation for international audiences.

items.title: CVnoAlvo
items.description: Web platform for adapting resumes to specific job openings, with compatibility analysis, ATS-optimized artifact generation, Java/Spring backend, JWT security, and external integrations.
items.stack: Java 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JWT, PostgreSQL, Docker

items.title: DSCommerce
items.description: E-commerce REST API with products, categories, users, orders, OAuth2/JWT authentication, role-based authorization, JPA/Hibernate data modeling, and Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.
items.stack: Java 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security, OAuth2, PostgreSQL

items.title: SYSMP
items.description: Full-stack deadline management system with JWT authentication, an admin dashboard, PostgreSQL, and real-time communication.
items.stack: Node.js, Express, React, TypeScript, WebSocket, PostgreSQL

whatSetsMeApart.title: What Sets Me Apart
whatSetsMeApart.description: My path combines software engineering with scientific rigor. It shows in how I document decisions, test critical flows, analyze data, and keep solutions simple enough to evolve.

doctorate.title: Doctor of Science in Entomology
doctorate.description: UFRPE (2009-2013) | Visiting Scholar: University of Nebraska-Lincoln (USA)
